title: Isolation of Cells from Frozen Human Intestinal Biopsies
author: Oxford HCA
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bcb6isre
materials: 10.Transfer to tubes and run through FACS.

steps.title: Per sample
steps.instruction: Per sample: pre-warm 10ml of Transport medium in the waterbath.

steps.title: Per sample
steps.instruction: Per sample: pre-warm 20ml of chelation medium in the waterbath.

steps.title: Partially thaw frozen biopsies in 37°C...
steps.instruction: Partially thaw frozen biopsies in 37°C waterbath until only a little ice remains.

steps.title: Dropwise add 1ml of pre-warmed transport...
steps.instruction: Dropwise add 1ml of pre-warmed transport media to the sample to thaw completely.

steps.title: Use a pastette to transfer the...
steps.instruction: Use a pastette to transfer the biopsies into the conical of pre-warmed transport media.

steps.title: Place a 70 micron filter onto a 50ml conical
steps.instruction: Place a 70 micron filter onto a 50ml conical.

steps.title: Transfer biopsies onto the filter
steps.instruction: Transfer biopsies onto the filter.

steps.title: Wash with 20ml of cold wash medium
steps.instruction: Wash with 20ml of cold wash medium.

steps.title: Transfer biopsies to 5ml warm chelation medium (in 50ml conical)
steps.instruction: Transfer biopsies to 5ml warm chelation medium (in 50ml conical).

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C for 10 mins (in incubator)
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C for 10 mins (in incubator).

steps.title: Vortex 2 x 5-10s
steps.instruction: Vortex 2 x 5-10s.

steps.title: Allow biopsies to settle
steps.instruction: Allow biopsies to settle. Remove biopsies from the chelation medium (containing potential isolated crypts) with FCS-coated pastette and transfer to fresh Falcon with 5ml warm chelation medium. Return the biopsies in fresh medium to 37°C incubator and repeat steps 10-12.

steps.title: Store chelation medium with the isolated...
steps.instruction: Store chelation medium with the isolated crypts at 4°C while proceeding with subsequent isolation steps.

steps.title: Repeat steps 9-13 for a total...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 9-13 for a total of 4 times, and pool crypt containing fractions.

steps.title: Spin down the pooled crypt suspension (300 g, 5 mins)
steps.instruction: Spin down the pooled crypt suspension (300 g, 5 mins).

steps.title: Resuspend in 3 ml warm TrypLE...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 3 ml warm TrypLE Express with 50 µg/ml DNAse at 37°C (75 µl of 2 mg/ml stock).

steps.title: Incubate 60 mins at 37°C in...
steps.instruction: Incubate 60 mins at 37°C in incubator shaking incubator (220 RPM).

steps.title: Filter with 70 µm cell strainer...
steps.instruction: Filter with 70 µm cell strainer (prepped with FCS) into 50 ml Falcon, wash through with 5 ml of T5 media.

steps.title: Spin filtrate 1500 RPM 5mins
steps.instruction: Spin filtrate 1500 RPM 5mins.

steps.title: Wash pellet with 30ml T5 media
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 30ml T5 media.

steps.title: Spin 1500 RPM 5mins
steps.instruction: Spin 1500 RPM 5mins.

steps.title: Very carefully remove supernatant until less than 1ml remains
steps.instruction: Very carefully remove supernatant until less than 1ml remains. Resuspend pellet in this.

steps.title: Run through 30um cell strainer (prepped...
steps.instruction: Run through 30um cell strainer (prepped with FCS) and wash through with 5ml of PBS.

steps.title: Spin 1500 RPM 5 mins, re-suspend...
steps.instruction: Spin 1500 RPM 5 mins, re-suspend in approximately 1ml of remaining PBS, transfer to Eppendorf.

steps.title: Make up to 1ml with PBS...
steps.instruction: Make up to 1ml with PBS and take 10 uL for count (1:1 with Trypan blue).

steps.title: For 10X single-cell sequencing, count each...
steps.instruction: For 10X single-cell sequencing, count each sample twice using countess to obtain average count and viability:

steps.title: Spin down in micro centrifuge (1500...
steps.instruction: Spin down in micro centrifuge (1500 RPM, 5 mins) and re-suspend using live count to concentration of 2000 cells/µl (2x10^6 cells/ml).

steps.title: re-check count and make volume to 1500 cells/µl (1
steps.instruction: re-check count and make volume to 1500 cells/µl (1.5x10^6 cells/ml) with PBS.

steps.title: Transfer to single cell facility on ice
steps.instruction: Transfer to single cell facility on ice.

steps.title: Transfer epithelial cells to a round bottom 96 well plate
steps.instruction: Transfer epithelial cells to a round bottom 96 well plate.

steps.title: Spin plate at 2200RPM for 2...
steps.instruction: Spin plate at 2200RPM for 2 mins, and dispose of supernatant.

steps.title: Add 200 µl wash buffer, and...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl wash buffer, and spin at 2200 RPM for 1min x2.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and add 100 µl of FACS buffer
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and add 100 µl of FACS buffer.

steps.title: Add 1:100 EpCAM-PE (1 µl), 1:50...
steps.instruction: Add 1:100 EpCAM-PE (1 µl), 1:50 CD24-PE-CF594 (2 µl) and 1:100 CD45-AF700 (1 µl).

steps.title: Place in fridge for 20 mins
steps.instruction: Place in fridge for 20 mins.

steps.title: Spin plate at 2200 RPM for...
steps.instruction: Spin plate at 2200 RPM for 1 min, and dispose of supernatant.

steps.title: Add 200µl wash buffer, and spin...
steps.instruction: Add 200µl wash buffer, and spin at 2200 RPM for 1min x2.

steps.title: Resuspend in 300µl of FACS buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 300µl of FACS buffer and add 1:100 (3 µl) of diluted Sytox Green.

steps.title: a
steps.instruction: a.1:60 (5 µl Sytox Green + 295 µl FACS buffer) – final dilution 1:6000.
